name: AppMetrica
description: Yandexs free real-time mobile app analytics and install attribution platform with crash reporting and push notifications.

seo.title: AppMetrica — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: AppMetrica: Yandexs free real-time mobile app analytics and install attribution platform with crash reporting and push notifications.

when_to_use: Free mobile attribution and analytics for apps with Yandex ad traffic
Crash reporting + push notifications in a single free SDK
Real-time install attribution across Google UAC and organic channels
In-app event tracking and funnel analysis without licensing cost

pros: Free with unlimited events and real-time reports
Bundles crash reporting and push notifications
Install attribution, funnels and cohorts built in
Low-friction SDK with solid Android support
cons: Owned by Yandex — geopolitical and data residency risk
Fewer ad network integrations than AppsFlyer
Limited SKAN and privacy-safe iOS tooling
Product roadmap uncertain for Western markets
review.verdict: Capable free MMP plus analytics, but Yandex ownership makes it a hard sell outside CIS markets in 2026.
review.best_for: Indie or cost-sensitive teams in CIS markets wanting free analytics plus attribution.
review.not_for: EU or US apps with strict vendor, sanctions or data-residency policies.
